name: bg-settings-light
prompt: a soft warm app background illustration, flat vector, gentle and non-distracting, low-contrast, soft gradients and faint paper texture, NO text, NO words, NO guitar fretboard lines. Keep the CENTER calm and mostly empty for app content. Wide landscape composition. Design language: large soft rounded translucent organic blobs forming gentle soft bands along the top edge and the bottom edge, with a calm center band between them. Warm palette: soft cream #FFF6EC center, blobs in teal #2DD4BF, coral and amber #FFB23E. Quietest version: just the soft blob bands and a single tiny music note in one corner.
